title: File Item
description: Represents a file or folder on a WD My Cloud Home device.

mimeType.description: MIME type of the file. 'application/x.wd.dir' indicates a folder.

size.description: File size in bytes. 0 for folders.

parentId.description: ID of the parent folder. 'root' for top-level items.

createdTime.description: Timestamp when the file was created.

modifiedTime.description: Timestamp when the file was last modified.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL for image or video thumbnail (images and videos only).

downloadUrl.description: Direct download URL for the file content.
